title: Trade remedies notice: registration of imports of hydrotreated vegetable oil (HVO) biodiesel originating from the United States of America (USA)
body: "Notice published by the Secretary of State for Business and Trade on the requirement to register imports of hydrotreated vegetable oil (HVO) biodiesel originating from the United States of America (USA). These are published under paragraph 29 of Schedule 4 to the Taxation (Cross-border Trade) Act 2018.  "
